figures.caption: Fig. 3. Feasibility fraction at (γ∗, β∗) across conditions. Dashed lines: random baselines (31.25% for n=6, 27.34% for n=8). Hardware FF exceeds random by 1.5–1.7×.
Fig. 5. Landscape energy span per instance and condition. Hardware LSC of 24–30% is consistent across all instances.

Fig. 6. (a) Raw vs. ZNE energy with error bars; percentage improvement annotated. (b) Standard-deviation inflation factor. AR comparison is omitted due to a Hamiltonian constant offset between the Pauli and QUBO energy scales.
